enableAdminUser.description: Enable admin user (basic authentication) with cluster-admin permissions
enableAdminUser.title: enableAdminUser

enableCyberjokerUser.description: Enable cyberjoker user (basic authentication) with namespace-scoped permissions
enableCyberjokerUser.title: enableCyberjokerUser

enableDemoSystemNamespace.description: enabling the demo creates the demo-system namespace, deploys two Route resources within it, and grants permissions to the cyberjoker user if that user is enabled
enableDemoSystemNamespace.title: enableDemoSystemNamespace

tenant.description: Display name of the platform tenant — shown in the sider tenant chip and the page eyebrows (dashboard greeting, compositions, observability). A deployer-set label, not derived data; defaults to krateo-enterprise.
tenant.title: tenant
